creator: mikeg@bsd-box.net
text:
Update sysutils/radmind to 1.13.0 (Latest available).  No particular reason for the update except that the port is over a year behind the currently available release.

* Update distfiles w/ new checksums
* Update Makefile to keep man pages in the right spot per hier(7)

Fix: Attached as a shell archive per Porter's Handbook
